content:
---

## ♀ VENUS (Design) — Gate 45.4

**Theme**: Gathering / Material Stewardship
**Trait**: You attract and manage resources.
**Line 4**: Tribe-based — you direct abundance toward your people.

---

## ♂ MARS (Personality) — Gate 4.4

**Theme**: Answers / Youthful Logic
**Trait**: Trial-and-error logic, especially when young.
**Line 4**: Requires emotional safety to express new logic to community.

---

## ♂ MARS (Design) — Gate 40.5

**Theme**: Work → Rest → Boundaries
**Trait**: Must have breaks between work output.
**Line 5**: Can teach others about sacred boundaries and work-life balance.

---

## ♃ JUPITER (Personality) — Gate 25.6

**Theme**: Innocence → Spirit Path
**Trait**: Grows by surrendering to purity and authentic spirit.
**Line 6**: Role model of higher love over time.
